extra.reason: Implemented edit_spot/edit_spot_fields options-flow steps in config_flow.py + strings; removing a sport prunes its per-spot prefs.
geocoding.py + add_spot place-name search & disambiguation step; raw coords fallback retained.
tests_ha/ real-HA guard (module imports + flow-schema render) + ha-guard CI job + requirements-ha-test.txt.

Windy + Stormglass providers (registered) + UKHO tide overlay + TideProvider/TIDE_PROVIDERS + tide data plumbing + API-key options step. Normalisers unit-tested; live API verification pending keys (noted in SCOPE M4). Unblocks c1v.6.

Sport priority moved to the card: draggable reorder editor in www/swelligence-card.js; get_overview takes priority from the caller; integration options step + CONF_SPORT_PRIORITY removed. Merged in PR #2.
Free-tier checkbox per keyed provider + auto-derived safe poll interval (free_tier_min_interval_minutes). Stormglass 10/day -> 6h/spot. Merged PR #4.
Domain taxonomy (providers/domains.py) + per-domain source provenance stamped by each provider into source_meta['sources']; surfaced as sensor data_sources attr + in LLM payload. Merged PR #5.

Per-spot tide preference gates score via precomputed ForecastPoint.tide_factor (pure tide.py); coordinator stamps from forecast tides or a UKHO/Stormglass overlay (12h TTL); tz reconciled. Merged PR #6.

Marine gap-fill/prefer overlay (overlay.py merge_marine) wired in coordinator with TTL-cached shared overlay fetch (reused for tides), per-domain provenance re-stamp, free-tier throttle. Merged PR #7.
Surf scores swell quality (period x direction window) via _swell_factor; swell_dir_deg added + fetched by all providers; per-spot swell overrides. Re-calibrated, no regressions. Merged PR #8.

Per-spot per-domain source routing: resolve_route() + per-spot provider/marine/tide overrides in edit-spot (inherit global). No CompositeProvider class — coordinator pipeline is the composite. Module-ordering bug caught by HA guard + fixed; guard hardened to render edit_spot_fields. Merged PR #9.
data_quality attribute shipped: per-sport quality summary (quality.py), grid-cell distance captured in open_meteo, haversine deduped into geo.py

Confidence from Stormglass inter-model spread shipped: field_confidence + aggregate_confidence (confidence.py), _spread() retains discarded {noaa,icon,...} values, surfaced as confidence/confidence_label on sensors and get_overview. Zero extra API calls.

Cross-provider ensemble shipped: ensemble_marine() derives per-field confidence from base-vs-overlay agreement (reuses al8.2 overlay TTL/free-tier throttle); optional consensus blend (CONF_MARINE_BLEND) with circular mean for directions. Opt-in via CONF_MARINE_ENSEMBLE. Confidence flows to existing sensor/get_overview surfaces via source_confidence.

LLM confidence verdict shipped: _build_prompt now feeds per-sport aggregate confidence (label+value), names fields where models disagree, and the data_quality source/quality summary; adds an instruction to voice low confidence in plain language. llm.py made HA-import-free (TYPE_CHECKING) so the prompt builder is unit-tested. Best-effort, no-op without an AI Task entity.

Provider-authority map shipped: authority.py ranks providers per domain (UKHO gold for UK tides region-gated; keyed marine > open_meteo for exposed-coast swell; wind has no hierarchy). recommend_sources() compares actual al8.1/al8.4 routing vs best AVAILABLE source -> nudge only when a strictly better configured source is unused. Surfaced via a per-spot DIAGNOSTIC 'Source advice' sensor + get_overview source_advice (no per-entity noise).

All 5 children complete. Forecast confidence & source intelligence layer shipped: per-sensor data_quality (o07.1), intra-provider Stormglass confidence (o07.2), cross-provider ensemble + blend (o07.3), provider-authority nudges (o07.4), LLM confidence verdict (o07.5). Built entirely on al8.1 provenance; supersedes al8.5.
README updated with confidence, data_quality, source-advice, and cross-provider ensemble docs
CLAUDE.md updated with live-HA rsync deploy + HACS release docs and real test commands

Windy provider removed: providers/windy.py deleted; dropped from PROVIDERS registry + __all__; config-flow docstring, strings/translations key, authority ranking, and all tests (test_domains, test_providers_keyed, test_authority, test_overlay, HA guard) updated; README/SCOPE docs updated. pytest green (163 passed).

Enabling refactor delivered (commits d10de14, +fallback): covers()/authority_rank on the overlay ABCs; metadata-derived authority (hardcoded DOMAIN_AUTHORITY table + _uk_tide/_sea_only gone); pure resolve_overlay/domain_ranking; coordinator auto-resolves tide source by region/priority; assert_legal_domains legality gate at the registry + authority maps; Open-Meteo modeled tide registered as the keyless priority-0 global fallback. Provider integration is now a wiring point: removing Stormglass = unregister; adding UKHO/CO-OPS/WorldTides = leaf class + register. pytest 172 passed. DEFERRED to 48w.6: collapsing the marine overlay/ensemble machinery into the generic loop (it's dead once Stormglass is removed).

NOAA CO-OPS tide provider added as a leaf (providers/noaa_coops.py): keyless, US-region-gated covers(), authority_rank={TIDE:100}, nearest-station + hilo predictions -> TideEvent. Auto-resolves for US coords; surfaces in UI from registry; no config-flow/coordinator/authority edits needed (wiring point confirmed). Tests: nearest-station, prediction parsing, US covers() gate, US resolver win. pytest 176 passed.

Stormglass provider removed: providers/stormglass.py deleted; dropped from PROVIDERS + TIDE_PROVIDERS + __all__; config-flow key field + free-tier toggle auto-drop (registry-derived) + providers-step guard fixed for UKHO; strings/translations cleaned; ~9 test files updated (test_authority rewritten around TIDE hierarchy, test_free_tier uses synthetic provider, Stormglass-specific cases removed); docstrings + README/SCOPE updated. Dependency on 48w.1 dropped per decision (confidence degrades gracefully to absent until re-sourced). Generic marine-overlay/ensemble + free-tier machinery left dormant for 48w.6. Tide stack now UKHO/CO-OPS/Open-Meteo-modeled. pytest 166 passed.

Open-Meteo batching delivered: async_fetch_many issues 2 batched calls (1 forecast + 1 marine) for all coords regardless of spot count, handles single-coord object vs multi-coord array, index-matches results, per-coord marine flag (inland marine-free, marine call skipped if none want it). OpenMeteoBatchLoader (TTL+lock) shares one batched fetch across all per-spot coordinators; wired in setup. Tests cover object-vs-array, index matching, per-coord marine, all-inland skip, empty, and loader caching/coalescing. pytest 176 passed.

Data-capture + exposure delivered: 12 additional-detail fields (swell_peak_period_s, wind_wave_height/period, secondary_swell_*, current_speed_kn/dir, sea_level_m, apparent_temp_c, uv_index, visibility_m, weather_code) fetched on the existing 2 Open-Meteo calls (variable names+units live-validated), normalised into ForecastPoint, grouped in DOMAIN_FIELDS, and surfaced via get_forecast. sea_level_m now populated (was declared-but-empty). Scoring consumption + profile recalibration deliberately split into a follow-up (riskier, needs validate_spots.py + analyze_history.py re-run) per the 'capture everything first' plan. pytest 176 passed.
Merged via PR #19: release.sh forces push_mirrors-sync on release; sync-on-release model documented.

v0.1.0 published + HACS install verified: HACS tracks f00lycooly/swelligence installed=True, version_installed=v0.1.0, installed_commit=39528ed, releases=True. End-to-end proven.
HACS release pipeline complete: GitHub mirror (sync-on-release), tag-triggered release.yml + bump helper, hacs.json/hacs-action, v0.1.0 published, HACS install verified at v0.1.0.
Search-first add-spot merged via PR #21 (CI green incl. HA guard flow-walk tests). Releasing as 0.1.1.
Map picker + postcode/area search merged via PR #23 (CI green incl. HA guard map-flow tests). Releasing 0.1.2.

Data model documented (docs/data-model.md); real samples for Southbourne/Mudeford/Sandbanks (sensors + forecast) under mockups/research/sample/; scripts/sample_spot.py regenerator. Merged PR #24 + #25.
Regenerated spot-detail.html as HA-themed static mockup, single-source model, real 3-spot data; build_card_data.py regenerator. Merged PR #26.

Shipped in PR #35 (merged to main). Panel-detail payload complete; contract documented (docs/panel-contract.md) and cross-posted to Tinkernet/HomeAutomation (PR #57, merged).

Panel work moved out of this repo — the LVGL 720x720 wall panel is owned by the ESPHome agent in Tinkernet/HomeAutomation (epic HomeAutomation-4uq; panel-spec.md + mockup 07 + the data contract swelligence-panel-contract.md all live there). Superseded — the map-hero mockup (mockups/spot-detail.template.html) is an older card iteration. The production Lovelace card (custom_components/swelligence/frontend/swelligence-card.js) has since been substantially reworked (its own _mapHero with static OSM tile mosaic + flow-direction compass + wind band, landed across the card commits), so this mockup-iteration task no longer reflects the card. Onshore/offshore label band remains parked in slh.6.

Wired surf-quality trio (peak period, sea-cleanliness, crossed-swell) + tide sea_level_m fallback gate into scoring; confidence scales extended; profiles re-calibrated live (wind unchanged, surf sane); docs updated. current-speed safety flag deferred to slh.2.

best_time (local HH:MM) added to SuitabilitySensor.extra_state_attributes; clock derivation factored into shared detail.best_clock() reused by detail.py best dict. Pure unit tests cover present/no-best/out-of-range/no-points. CHANGELOG noted.

panel-contract.md §7 'Per-sport sensors' added: entity_id pattern, unavailable=hide, attribute table (incl best_time), scalars->entities/arrays->detail principle, pinned label->slug mapping. Versioning renumbered to §8.

tests_ha guard test_sport_entity_id_suffix_is_pinned asserts slugify(label)==pinned suffix for every SPORT_PROFILES sport (and that the pin set == profile set), so a label rename or new sport fails CI loudly.
